parts.text:
**Weekly Review Report 📊**

**Date:** Sunday, March 15, 2026 📆

**Introduction:**

Welcome to your weekly review report! This is your chance to reflect on your progress, celebrate wins, and identify areas for improvement. Please find below a summary of your activities and accomplishments over the past week.

**Deen 🕊️**

This week, we'll focus on improving our Deen practices.

**Section 1: Prayer Accuracy 🕋️**

* On-time prayer accuracy: 34.29% 🤔
	+ Late prayer instances: 0 🙏
	+ Missed prayer instances: 0 🙏
	+ Unknown prayer instances: 23 🤔
	+ Retroactive prayer instances: 0 🙏
* Guidance:
	+ Set a 10-minute pre-adhan prep routine to improve on-time consistency. 📝
	+ Use reactions immediately after each prayer to reduce unknown logs. 📱
	+ Attach morning/evening adhkar to fixed anchors (after Fajr and after Maghrib). 📅
	+ Ramadan mode: prioritize punctual salah, daily Quran target, and consistent night worship. 💪

**Section 2: Quran 📖**

* Total pages read: 30 📚
* Maximum juz reached: 0 📚

**Section 3: Tahajjud 🌃**

* Successful tahajjud prayers: 5/4 🙏

**Section 4: Adhkar 📅**

* Morning adhkar: 0 📅
* Evening adhkar: 0 📅

**Section 5: Guidance and Reminders 📝**

Please refer to the guidance provided in the Deen metrics section for areas to focus on in the upcoming week.

**Wins and Celebrations 🎉**

* Congratulations on completing the week with a consistent tahajjud routine! 🌃
* Keep up the good work on your Quran reading goal! 📚

**Missed Commitments 🤔**

This week, we didn't have any missed commitments. Keep up the great work, and remember that it's okay to have off days! 😊

**Suggestions for Next Week 📆**

* Set reminders for your 10-minute pre-adhan prep routine. 📅
* Make sure to attach morning and evening adhkar to fixed anchors. 📅
* Prioritize punctual salah, daily Quran target, and consistent night worship during Ramadan mode. 💪

**Life Areas 📈**

* Deen: 34.29% on-time prayer accuracy
* Family: [insert family metrics]
* Work: [insert work metrics]
* Health: [insert health metrics]

**Weekly Focus Goals 📈**

1. Improve on-time prayer accuracy by setting a 10-minute pre-adhan prep routine.
2. Increase Quran reading by setting a daily target.
3. Maintain consistent night worship during Ramadan mode.

**Progress toward Monthly/Quarterly Goals 📈**

Please refer to the monthly/quarterly goals for this week. We didn't have any significant accomplishments or setbacks.

**Closing Thoughts 🙏**

Thank you for taking the time to review your progress. Remember to stay focused, consistent, and patient with yourself. Keep up the good work, and we'll be here to support you every step of the way! 💪
